originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&driver_data` is never used.

model:
(define-fun CONFIG_UNIX98_PTYS () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_DEVPTS_MULTIPLE_INSTANCES () Bool
  true)
reasoning: Line 39: `driver_data = &some_int` in ptmx_open() (compiled when UNIX98=T). When the non-goto path is taken, driver_data is assigned at L39 then function returns at L41 — dead store. DEVPTS only controls pts_sb_from_inode() at L8; it has no effect on the dead store at L39. The dead store occurs for any config with UNIX98=T. No '// ERROR' at L39 → new bug not in VBDB. PC adds DEVPTS=T unnecessarily. Over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
